issue_summary: Better accuracy for the length normalization factor.
javadoc_after:
/** * Function that returns the decoded norm for every document. *

* Note that the configured Similarity for the field must be * a subclass of {@link TFIDFSimilarity} and the contribution of * the TF needs to be 1 when the freq is 1 and the contribution * of the IDF needs to be 1 when docFreq == docCount == 1. * @lucene.internal */
